overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city street in a video game, featuring neon-lit buildings, holographic advertisements, and wet pavement reflections. The scene showcases futuristic urban architecture with dominant purple and cyan neon lighting, light pedestrian traffic, and occasional vehicles passing on the multi-lane road.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-slicked cyberpunk sidewalk with a yellow pawn shop kiosk on the left and a towering neon-lit hotel on the right. The atmosphere is thick with mist and neon reflections on the wet pavement. A character in white clothing suddenly runs toward the camera and passes by closely at 10.5 seconds.

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the pawn shop area, observing passing vehicles

segments.scene_description: Having passed the pawn shop, the view opens to show more of the multi-lane street with vehicles including a white van and blue car passing by. The neon hotel tower looms closer on the right, and protective bollards line the sidewalk edge. The wet pavement continues to reflect the vibrant neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown corridor with mixed modern architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past the neon hotel and alongside a modern glass building, following the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing red hat and dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the cyberpunk street, the camera moves past the prominent neon hotel tower which recedes into the distance on the right. A modern glass building with teal accents appears on the left, and a pedestrian in a red hat walks ahead. The street maintains its wet, neon-reflective atmosphere with distant holographic advertisements visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-slicked cyberpunk sidewalk that transitions from a narrow, misty corridor into a wider urban vista. It begins beside a yellow pawn shop kiosk and a towering neon-lit hotel, where the atmosphere is thick with mist and a character in white clothing suddenly sprints past the camera. As the view opens up, the camera moves past the kiosk to reveal a multi-lane street filled with passing vehicles, including a white van and a blue car, while protective bollards line the edge of the reflective pavement. The scene then shifts as the hotel tower recedes into the distance on the right, making way for a modern glass building with teal accents on the left. Finally, the camera follows a pedestrian in a red hat deeper into the city, moving toward distant holographic advertisements under the glow of vibrant neon lights.
